items.text:
Subject: Confirmation of Your Career Center Appointment

Dear Ms. Tran,

Thank you for scheduling a resume review with the Bowen Career Center. Your appointment is confirmed for Thursday, November 14, from 2:30 PM to 3:15 PM in Room 210 of Lowell Hall.

Please bring a printed copy of your current resume and a list of three companies you hope to apply to. We've found that students who arrive prepared make the most of their session.

A few reminders before you arrive:

- Check in at the front desk at least ten minutes early.
- A $5 printing fee applies if you need copies made on site.
- Appointments missed without 24 hours' notice may not be rescheduled this term.

If you'd like to add a mock interview to your visit, reply to this message by November 12 so we can reserve extra time. Questions can be directed to careers@bowen.edu or by calling the front desk.

We look forward to working with you.

Sincerely,
The Bowen Career Center

format_metadata.subject: Confirmation of Your Career Center Appointment

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Ms. Tran bring to her appointment?

options.A: A printed resume and a list of companies
options.B: A signed form from her academic advisor
options.C: A printing fee receipt from the front desk
options.D: A completed mock interview question sheet

questions.explanation: The email asks her to bring a printed copy of her current resume and a list of three companies she hopes to apply to.

questions.stem: According to the email, what happens if an appointment is missed without notice?

options.A: A printing fee is charged to the student
options.B: A new appointment may not be offered
options.C: A reminder email is sent the following day
options.D: A mock interview is scheduled automatically

questions.explanation: The email states that appointments missed without 24 hours' notice may not be rescheduled this term.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who wants a mock interview?

options.A: They must pay an additional review fee
options.B: They should bring two extra resume copies
options.C: They need to request it before November 12
options.D: They will meet with a different career counselor

questions.explanation: The email says to reply by November 12 to add a mock interview so extra time can be reserved, implying the request must come before that date.
